name: linSlFSMSetStBegin
title: linSlFSMSetStBegin
syntax: void linSlFSMSetStBegin(unsigned int slaveId, unsigned int stateId);
description: Prepares the configuration of the state specified by stateId of the Slave with the identifier slaveId.
The entire configuration of a state must appear within one linSlFSMSetStBegin / linSlFSMSetStEnd pair.

parameters.name: slaveId
parameters.description: Identifier of the relevant Slave. Corresponds to the slaveId that was defined with linSlSimulate.
